subject: Carkol, a large coal-cart Pokemon moving through a cave environment with fire and smoke
description: A large, hulking Pokemon with a dark rocky body and glowing orange-red embers visible within it surges forward through a cave tunnel. Flame and smoke billow from the top of its body. The creature's form evokes a coal cart or industrial furnace — dark, massive, and generating heat. The cave background is rendered in dark tones with hints of warm amber from the fire light. The motion and scale convey power and labor, a beast of burden built from coal itself.
foreground: large dark coal-body Pokemon with glowing ember interior, flame and smoke above
background: dark cave tunnel, warm fire-lit walls
